0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7490901946470122265","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得挺好，就是有点费脑，准者脑洞很大，多世界线同时进行的叙事方式，好几个不同世界的剧情线来回穿插叙述，很考验记忆力，只适合一口气全部看完，如果一有段时间没看再回来看这本书，或者看完这本书已有内容后，去看其他书再回来看，很容易就变得云里雾里忘剧情了，书里有很多理论数据和脑洞设想本来就让人不明嚼栗了[捂脸]按设定后面世界线还会越来越多，看一本书跟同时追看十本差不多了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744115812,"group_id":"7386641903917222974","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个喜欢安安静静看书的人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3pbpnNUYC/bw0Om7Ls7oJo=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d6eeea40c2834fa0b6b5539192ac385f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795721&x-signature=XKuiCfKk2U5%2FkcnzJ0cfcYFKOJY%3D","user_id":"63334181058","user_name":"吁鱼雨彧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"63334181058","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1755702354,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":24,"name":"气氛达人","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b7c8672db629fbb3d8f83a83721675dc~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/d2c24adfe48394cad03d7b1d29d70622~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7386641903917222974","book_info":{"abstract":"【选择一：获得随机一种特殊血脉】

or":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7511320551584744217","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"前面剧情还是挺好的，最喜欢模因东乐那段剧情，“当思维被笼罩在神秘当中，当力量被隐匿在名为能力的黑盒之下，当不假思索成为主流，神灵便成了命运，上帝是一切的主宰。”
当神秘退去，当理性开始统治世界，当万事万物可以被度量；”
“当定性与定量的工具开始解构世界运行的法则。”
“我说，此刻，上帝已死!!!”
真的好帅，但最近感觉怎么说呢，有点偏离主线，太多配角占用篇幅了，主角好久都没出场。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748870048,"group_id":"7386641903917222974","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我想一直看下去","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5tzcK1HIQnMfjnnMp65r5elsATZQLhfl1EfJRXtkvaK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f33b4f02e5224f9097142ae13aa7b5e3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792895&x-signature=AsAsEzUb8nJJAIELo2b3brLfPLo%3D","user_id":"1503746225607630","user_name":"遗月忘虚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1503746225607630","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7386641903917222974","book_info":{"abstract":"【选择一：获得随机一种特殊血脉】
